question:
What makes "love bombing" — overwhelming a new romantic partner with excessive affection early on — a recognized red flag in relationships?
A) It is medically proven to cause heart disease.
B) Excessive early affection is always a sign of true love and should be embraced.
C) It can be a manipulation tactic that creates dependency and bypasses the natural, gradual process of building genuine trust.
D) It is only a red flag if the gifts are inexpensive.
